arch/udn.h File Reference

Provides low-level support for the UDN (user dynamic network). More...


Data Structures

union  DynamicHeader
 Final routing destinations for dynamic messages. More...
struct  DynamicHeader::_bits
 Useful for setting route parameters. More...

Defines

#define UDN_DEMUX_WORDS   (249 + 4)
 The size of the UDN demux, in 8-byte words.
#define __UDN_REG_TO_TAG(n)   (n)
 UDN register numbers are used literally as tags.
#define UDN0_DEMUX_TAG   __UDN_REG_TO_TAG(0)
 The default tag for UDN demux queue 0.
#define UDN1_DEMUX_TAG   __UDN_REG_TO_TAG(1)
 The default tag for UDN demux queue 1.
#define UDN2_DEMUX_TAG   __UDN_REG_TO_TAG(2)
 The default tag for UDN demux queue 2.
#define UDN3_DEMUX_TAG   __UDN_REG_TO_TAG(3)
 The default tag for UDN demux queue 3.

Functions

unsigned int INIT_DYNAMIC_HEADER (int x, int y, int demux, int length)
 Initialize a DynamicHeader option with specific values.
unsigned int fill_dynamic_header (int x, int y, int demux, int length)
 Generate a dynamic header.
unsigned int udn_tile_coord (void)
 Get the UDN tile coordinate.
unsigned int udn_tile_coord_x (void)
 Get the X component of the UDN tile coordinate.
unsigned int udn_tile_coord_y (void)
 Get the Y component of the UDN tile coordinate.
void udn_send (uint_reg_t word)
 Send a word onto the UDN.
uint_reg_t udn0_receive (void)
 Receive a word from UDN demux queue 0.
uint_reg_t udn1_receive (void)
 Receive a word from UDN demux queue 1.
uint_reg_t udn2_receive (void)
 Receive a word from UDN demux queue 2.
uint_reg_t udn3_receive (void)
 Receive a word from UDN demux queue 3.
unsigned int udn0_available_count (void)
 Get the number of words in UDN demux queue 0.
unsigned int udn1_available_count (void)
 Get the number of words in UDN demux queue 1.
unsigned int udn2_available_count (void)
 Get the number of words in UDN demux queue 2.
unsigned int udn3_available_count (void)
 Get the number of words in UDN demux queue 3.
unsigned int udn_available_mask (void)
 Determine which UDN demuxes have data available.

Detailed Description

Provides low-level support for the UDN (user dynamic network).
